summary: Very good recording with an excellent second set despite some technical hiccups.
review: The reviewer praises the second set as outstanding and notes that the overall sound quality is very good, even though there were a few technical difficulties during the capture. The performance shines enough to outweigh any minor audio glitches, making this release enjoyable for fans.

ai_rating.rationale: Single 4‑star review highlights a strong second set and generally good recording; limited data leads to low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review mentions technical difficulties but overall describes the recording as very good.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set singled out as excellent; no specific criticisms of pacing or song selection.
